description: Account Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers + Event Types. (1) Zero account event handlers in events worker (W-01). (2) Zero account event types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES map (W-02). (3) Audit handler has 3 account event mappings (Created/Updated/Deleted) but events never reach it because worker has no handlers and dispatcher has no types (W-03). Add event handlers for AccountCreated, AccountUpdated, AccountDeleted (requires IFC-271), AccountRevenueUpdated, AccountHierarchyUpdated, AccountIndustryCategorized to events worker. Register all types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES. Cross-ref: W-01/W-02 pattern shared with Contact (IFC-261). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 14.

wiring_complete.target: 6/6 event types handled; audit trail populated for account mutations

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md.
